channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lindsey Graham Honored for Backing Ukraine, Trans-Atlantic Ties, and Israel
item.description: Leaders from NATO allies, Ukraine, and Israel praised U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham as a friend and advocate for trans-Atlantic relations.

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham Dies at Age 71
Trump's Energy Strategy May Pay Off as Global Oil and Gas Use Hits New High
item.description: U.S. oil production reached a record 21.1 million barrels per day in 2025, with fossil fuels still providing 86% of global energy, a new report shows.

item.title: Democratic Governor Presses McConnell on Health, Citing Past Trump Concerns
item.description: Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear demands Senator Mitch McConnell disclose his undisclosed medical condition as the 84-year-old remains absent from the Senate.
